zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wood於1477年出生在英國坎布利其爾福爾布時，她的父親Gregory Clark25歲，母親Elizabeth Sotherland18歲。她於1498年10月9日與Thomas Aldrich在英國諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年53歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wood于1477年出生在英国坎布利其爾福爾布时，她的父亲Gregory Clark25岁，母亲Elizabeth Sotherland18岁。她于1498年10月9日与Thomas Aldrich在英国諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年53岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wood was born in 1477, in Fulbourn, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Gregory Clark, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Sotherland, was 18. She married Thomas Aldrich on 9 October 1498, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1530, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wood est née en 1477, à Fulbourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Gregory Clark, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sotherland, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Aldrich le 9 octobre 1498, à Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1530, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wood 1477 in Fulbourn, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gregory Clark 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Sotherland 18. Sie hat am 9. Oktober 1498 in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England Thomas Aldrich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1530 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wood è nata il nel 1477 nel Fulbourn, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Gregory Clark, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Sotherland, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Aldrich il 9 ottobre 1498, nel Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1530, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Woodが1477年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアフウルボウルンで生まれた時，父Gregory Clarkは25歳，母Elizabeth Sotherlandは18歳であった。1498年10月9日にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウスでThomas Aldrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで53歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wood(이)가 1477년 영국 캄브리지실르 프보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gregory Clark(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Sotherland(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1498년 10월 9일 영국 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 Thomas Aldrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wood nasceu em 1477, em Fulbourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gregory Clark, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sotherland, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Aldrich em 9 de outubro de 1498, em Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1530, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wood родилась в 1477 г. в местности фьулбурн, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gregory Clark было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sotherland, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Aldrich 9 октября 1498 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1530 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Aldrich el 9 de octubre de 1498, en Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1530, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
